headline: validate-all.sh now fails when verify-external-deps fails

bullets: Fix latent bug in validate-all.sh: a verify-external-deps.sh failure no longer slips through as green. Previously the orchestrator printed the failure but didn't increment its failure counter, so make validate exited 0. Every other sub-validator's exit code was already captured — verify-external-deps was the lone outlier. If your CI ever expected validate to catch a missing tool, it now does.
